seoTitle: South Durras vs South Grafton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Durras and South Grafton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Durras vs South Grafton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Durras and South Grafton.
heading: South Durras vs South Grafton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Durras, New South Wales and South Grafton, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Durras has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to South Grafton (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Durras or South Grafton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Durras has a flood risk score of 49/100, while South Grafton scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Durras scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. South Grafton scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Durras or South Grafton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Durras has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
